English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Mon Cochran papers
Moncrieff, Cochran.
Cornell University. Family Matters Project
New York State College of Human Ecology. Cornell Early Childhood Program
Cornell University. Swedish Practicum in Childhood, Family, and Social Policy
23-13-3720
2 cubic feet. 2 cubic feet.
1973-2005. Correspondence, Reports, Printed Materials, Research Materials Correspondence, grant files, project files, and videos pertaining to Cochran's career and his work. Collection material in English 6402783
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
March 2009
EAD encoding:
Jessica Shon, March 3, 2009
Date modified:
RMC Staff, October 2018
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Professor of Human Development, Cornell University.
Mon Cochran received a B.A. from Harvard (1964) and M.A.(1969) and Ph.D. (1973) degrees from the University of Michigan. He directed the Cornell Early Childhood Program and retired in 2008.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Correspondence, grant files, project files, and videos pertaining to Cochran's career and his work with child care and prekindergarten programs, the Cornell Early Childhood Program, the Swedish Practicum in Childhood, Family, and Social Policy Program, and the Family Matters Project.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Biographical - Vita, Publications
Series II. Curriculum Material
Series III. Proposals
Series IV. Programs
Series V. Films
Cite As:
Mon Cochran papers, #23-13-3720. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Related Materials
See also collections #23-2-2817, #47-10-3394 and #23-13-1868 for additional biographical information.
Motion pictures (visual works). Videotapes. Day care centers -- United States. Education, Preschool -- United States. Child care -- Sweden. Child care -- United States. Nursery schools -- New York ( State) -- Ithaca. Families -- Study and teaching. Communication in families -- United States. Family life education -- United States. Moncrieff, Cochran. Cornell University -- : Faculty. New York State College of Human Ecology. Department of Human Development
